design_units.note: positive/negative/adjacent; deep-research + opinion discriminations in description
search_fan_out + bounded iterative_deepening + source grading + claim->evidence, grounded in KB
per-tier hard budget caps + citation/honesty controls; validator externalizes the output contract
15 deterministic + 6 behavioral; every checklist edge bound
time-to-answer/cost-per-success per tier, traceability, confident-wrong rate, activation precision

checklist_coverage.edge: Ambiguous-scope question that LOOKS simple but is genuinely contested (e.g. 'is coffee bad for you?') → classify COMPLEX, triangulate conflicting evidence, state the conflict + a calibrated confidence — not a false-simple single-source answer
Volatile/current-value question ('current CEO of <co>' / 'latest version of <X>') → require a recent DATED source and state the as-of date; a single stale source → Medium/Low confidence, never High
Unanswerable / no reliable source after the budget → tier=uncertain, Low confidence, explicit 'could not confirm', ZERO fabricated claims, within the <=5-min cap
Conflicting sources (two reputable sources disagree) → triangulate and present both with the more-reliable verdict → never silently pick one
Deep-report request ('comprehensive deep research report on X') → adjacent false-trigger → route to deep-research, do NOT run the bounded fact-check flow
Multi-part compound question ('what is X and how does it compare to Y') → decompose, parallel-search each part → answer ALL parts, not just the first clause
Subjective/opinion question ('best laptop for me') → out of scope or reframed to the factual sub-claim → no fabricated 'fact'
Simple single-fact question → stay within 1 round / <=1 fetch / parallel first round → do NOT over-search a 2-min question into a 5-min one
Answer document that makes a factual claim but lists ZERO sources → validator FAIL (unsourced claim, claim_evidence_traceability)
Answer with a dangling citation [n] that exceeds the source list → validator FAIL (citation does not resolve to a listed source)
Answer missing a Confidence label → validator FAIL (no confidence/uncertainty signal)
Answer declaring tier=complex but listing only 1 source → validator FAIL (per-tier source bar: complex requires >=2 independent sources)
Validator run twice on the same answer document → identical verdict (idempotency / determinism)
Non-English / CJK question ('X 是什么') → triage + search + answer correctly without choking on non-ASCII → citations still resolve

verification.evidence: Red-first: stub returned a wrong sentinel, harness produced 15 real FAIL lines incl. idempotency + CLI (.skill-engineer/red/red.log). Green: 23/23 deterministic pass, exit 0. Mutations (each reverted to green): complex source-bar 2->1 flipped D6; whole-text citation scan flipped D17+D18; URL-strip disabled flipped D21. B1 behavioral case run for real end-to-end (parallel search, 0 fetch, early-exit), produced answer VALID by check_answer.mjs. TWO Final-Acceptance loops: battery-1 (41 inputs) found E_UNSOURCED_CLAIM evadable via stray marker in Sources/Caveats + CRLF false-negative; battery-2 (50 inputs) defeated it via a [n] inside a URL/code-block/Caveats-before-Sources; battery-3 (41 inputs) defeated it via a [n] inside an HTML comment. Final fix is REGION-BASED: citations counted ONLY in the Answer+Key-evidence regions with HTML comments, code spans/blocks, and URLs stripped (BOM+CRLF normalized, distinct-URL source bar, real-content BLUF, clean CLI errors). The remaining 'trivial-citation laundering' case is irreducibly semantic (no structural rule separates uncited-summary+cited-trivia from uncited-synthesis+cited-support without forcing mis-citation on inference answers) -> scoped honestly: validator=structural traceability, protocol(search-protocol.md s6)=semantic. battery-4 (44 inputs) found 2 more invisible-marker vectors (a [n] inside an HTML attribute and a markdown reference-link definition) -> remediated by stripping HTML tags + ref-def lines from the citable region. Each structural defeat locked by a regression case (D16-D26, all mutation-guarded); docs realigned. NOTE: battery-4 was not re-certified clean by a 5th battery (loop budget MAX_FULL_LOOPS=3 exhausted) -> effective_verdict honestly held at candidate; the invisible-marker-evasion class is an asymptote for a regex linter (realistic/good-faith answers validate correctly; remaining vectors require deliberate citation-hiding).

notes: SKILL.md is 94 lines / ~1.3k tokens always-loaded — deliberately lean for the speed intent; detail is in rules/ and references/ loaded on demand.
8 of 14 checklist edges are bound to the deterministic, conductor-re-runnable harness; 6 are behavioral (triage/routing/multi-part) bound to eval cases and independently attacked at final acceptance.
Time budgets are operationalized as structural caps (rounds/width/fetches), not a literal timer — see rules/triage.md.
